sqlMap.select:
SELECT u1.*,u2.staffName as userName FROM sys_role_user_t u1, sys_user_t u2 WHERE u1.validflag>0 AND u2.validflag>0 AND u1.userid=u2.id
u1.roleid=$roleid$
u2.validflag = $userFlag$
u2.departmentid = $departmentid$
u2.townshipid = $townshipid$
SELECT COALESCE(id,COUNT(id)) FROM sys_role_user_t WHERE roleid=$roleid$ AND userid=$userid$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_user_t (roleid,userid,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($roleid$,$userid$,$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_role_user_t SET validflag=$validflag$ WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE sys_role_user_t SET roleid=$roleid$ WHERE userid = $userid$ and validflag=1
UPDATE sys_role_user_t SET validflag=0 WHERE id = $id$
